changes: Added RateLimiter struct with sliding window implementation using HashMap<String, Vec<Instant>>
Added rate_limit_middleware function to enforce rate limits before route handlers
Added necessary imports: ConnectInfo, HashMap, Mutex, Duration, Instant
Modified axum::serve() call to use .into_make_service_with_connect_info::<SocketAddr>() to enable IP extraction
Added comprehensive test_rate_limiting() test covering: 10 requests allowed, 11th blocked, different IPs isolated
file_insights.impact: MAJOR - adds new security feature affecting all requests

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Instant timestamps in a Vec per IP, removes expired timestamps, checks count against max_requests
patterns_discovered.benefit: Fair and precise rate limiting that accounts for actual request distribution within the window

patterns_discovered.description: rate_limit_middleware applied as .layer() before route handlers using axum's middleware::from_fn_with_state
patterns_discovered.benefit: Centralized enforcement that applies to all routes without per-handler boilerplate
Proper socket-level IP extraction works with load balancers and proxies (when X-Forwarded-For not needed)

patterns_discovered.description: Arc<Mutex<HashMap>> for state + Arc<AppState> pattern with cloning for middleware
patterns_discovered.benefit: Safe concurrent access to request history across tokio tasks

gotchas_discovered.description: .unwrap() on Mutex lock can panic if previous holder panicked, poisoning the lock
gotchas_discovered.location: RateLimiter::check_rate_limit(), line with 'let mut requests = self.requests.lock().unwrap()'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Entire rate limiter goes down if any request handler panics

gotchas_discovered.description: HashMap entries for IPs persist indefinitely even after their request histories are cleaned. IPs that appear once never get removed.
gotchas_discovered.location: RateLimiter::check_rate_limit() - entry() creates HashMap entries that are never evicted
gotchas_discovered.impact: Memory leak in long-running servers with many unique client IPs

gotchas_discovered.description: ConnectInfo extraction requires explicit .into_make_service_with_connect_info::<SocketAddr>() during server setup
gotchas_discovered.impact: Easy to miss - forgetting this breaks IP extraction silently

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses Instant (monotonic clock) instead of SystemTime; Instant doesn't support serialization and resets on system sleep
gotchas_discovered.impact: Rate limit window resets if system sleeps; can't log absolute timestamps

approach_details.strategy: In-memory sliding window with per-IP request timestamp tracking
features_implemented: Max 10 requests per 60-second window per IP
Cleanup of stale timestamps within window

recommendations.recommendation: Replace .unwrap() on Mutex with .unwrap_or() or convert to Result to handle poisoning gracefully
recommendations.rationale: Prevents complete service failure if any request handler panics

recommendations.recommendation: Add periodic cleanup of empty IP entries (e.g., via background task every 5 minutes)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents unbounded HashMap growth in production with many client IPs

recommendations.recommendation: Add debug/warn logging for rate limit violations with IP and request count
recommendations.rationale: Helps identify DoS attacks or misbehaving clients

recommendations.recommendation: Make rate limit values (10 requests, 60 secs) configurable via environment variables or CLI flags
recommendations.rationale: Allows tuning without recompilation; production may need different limits than development

recommendations.recommendation: If scaling to multiple bop serve instances, consider Redis-backed rate limiting
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation is per-process; distributed systems need shared state
